station.title: Waybler — Charging station
station.description: Enter the IDs for your parking spot and contract. You can find these in the Waybler app or from your setup document.

data_description.price_sensor: Override the spot price source used by the optimizer. Leave empty to use the price data built into the Waybler integration.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Waybler — check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This Waybler account is already configured.

data_description.price_sensor: Override the spot price source used by the optimizer. Leave empty to use the price data built into the Waybler integration.
data_description.opt_auto_start: When enabled, a charging session starts automatically as soon as the car is plugged in, using the selected strategy to set the price limit.
data_description.opt_strategy: How the optimizer calculates the maximum price it will accept to charge. See each option for details.
data_description.opt_min_hours: Used by the 'Cheapest hours' strategy. The optimizer will pick enough of the cheapest upcoming hours to cover this many hours of charging.
data_description.opt_percentile: Used by the 'Percentile' strategy. For example, 40 means the optimizer will only charge when the current price is in the cheapest 40% of today's prices.
data_description.opt_fixed_limit: Used by the 'Fixed ceiling' strategy. Charging is allowed as long as the spot price stays below this value (EUR/kWh, excl. VAT).
